variable will be 
null/missing for that month; this includes beneficiaries not enrolled in Medicare for the month. 
Effective with MBSF ABDC V2, a beneficiary with a verified or unverified date of death will have a 
null/missing Part C plan type code for any month that is after the death date. 

There are 12 monthly variables — where the 01 through 12 at the end of the variable name 
correspond with the month (e.g., 01 is January and 12 is December).
